title: G. B. Cooley House, Second Floor Plan (HABS LA-1230, sheet 3)
era_or_year: house designed 1908 (Walter Burley Griffin); HABS drawings documented 1991
creator: Historic American Buildings Survey; design architect Walter Burley Griffin; delineator David Zeigler (and others)
research_notes: Plan is sheet 3 (00003v.jpg) of HABS LA-1230 'Drawings'. Title block 'Second Floor Plan, Sheet 3 of 7'.
research_features: Clean Prairie School plan: long horizontal massing, Sun Porch, two bedrooms, two stairs, square structural piers, full dimensions. Designed by Walter Burley Griffin (Frank Lloyd Wright associate).
feature_highlights: long horizontal Prairie School bar, about 88 feet end to end
regular rhythm of square structural piers along the perimeter
Sun Porch at one end, two roughly equal central bedrooms
two separate stairs (both marked DN) for vertical circulation
fully dimensioned bays with imperial and metric scale bars and a north arrow
supported_examples: square structural piers as point-like fixtures
roadmap_examples: multi-floor (second floor of a stacked house)
